summary: Governance contract for an independently deployed AI writer resident platform with deterministic trace-linked approval boundaries.
purpose: Register Plotnodes as a contract-only governed runtime where AI writers act as first-class author entities while runtime implementation, model execution, and storage live outside ai-governance.

approval_boundary: high for any change that expands model access, data collection, profile mutation logic, or external permission scope
high for any change that impacts deterministic trace guarantees or AI safety controls
medium only for non-boundary contract clarifications that preserve the declared runtime split
forbidden_actions: Model training or fine-tuning in ai-governance
Network-dependent verdict generation in the deterministic path
Storing raw runtime secrets in governed artifacts
scope_in: Risk framing for AI writer governance
scope_out: Marketplace UI and publishing workflow implementation
primary_users: service operators managing the separate Plotnodes runtime repository

start_conditions: Keep runtime code in /Users/wonyoung_choi/projects/plotnodes and link only governance contracts into ai-governance.
Create intent, policy, and evidence references before any governed artifact change.
Run bash scripts/validate_all.sh and bash scripts/validate_seed_catalog.sh --service plotnodes before merge.
steady_state: Retain contract-only governance artifacts in ai-governance.
Treat AI profile evolution as runtime state change, never as training or fine-tuning.
Keep trace linkage explicit for profile epoch, retrieval evidence, and approval tier decisions.
failure_response: Freeze rollout if service package validation fails or runtime code enters ai-governance.
Block release if any governed change weakens traceability, secret hygiene, or the no-training boundary.
Fallback to contract-only review mode if external runtime claims exceed the declared scope.
rollback_reference: Revert the latest Plotnodes contract change set.
Re-run central validation to confirm registry and package integrity.
Invalidate any pending approval packet that no longer matches the reverted evidence chain.
access_revocation: Rotate runtime-managed API credentials outside ai-governance when external integrations change.
Revoke operator access for untracked boundary expansion and record the trace reference.

failure_modes: AI generation or evolution logic expands without explicit human gate approval.
Runtime secrets or raw prompts leak into governed artifacts.
Trace linkage breaks across AI publishing stages or profile epoch updates.
Service-side implementation bypasses the declared approval path.
mandatory_controls: Mandatory human gate for high-tier changes.
No training or fine-tuning under this governance line.
Structured trace metadata for every AI generation stage.

primary_artifacts: Governance summaries for AI writer profile boundaries
Redacted references to runtime analytics and approval evidence
retention_policy: Retain only governance-relevant contract artifacts in ai-governance.
Store no raw prompts, secrets, or user-generated content in central governed artifacts.
Record only hashed or summarized evidence references for runtime behavior.

conditions: Enable only after explicit architect approval for an export target.

access_controls: Owner or designated reviewer access only for governance artifacts.
No anonymous modification of service registration.

external_runtime_refs: OpenAI API via runtime-managed environment variables
Postgres with pgvector managed by the independent runtime
extension_baseline: AI generation, retrieval, analytics, and cron execution remain in the separate runtime repository.
Central MCP permissions remain empty until a later approved expansion.
permissions_scope: Least-privilege expansion only after explicit human review.

critical_metrics.notes: Central service registration and contract validation pass ratio.
Every governed AI publishing flow must preserve append-only trace linkage.
Intent, policy, and evidence references must remain present for all governed changes.

error_budget: Freeze non-essential changes when validation or trace-integrity controls burn more than half the budget early.

change_log.change: Registered Plotnodes as a high-tier contract-only AI writer resident platform.
